Automatically repair broken Playwright E2E tests. When a UI change renames or restructures an element and a test's selector breaks, the engine diagnoses the failure, patches the broken selector/wait, verifies the new selector against the live DOM, then re-runs the test until it passes (or a retry cap is hit) and writes the fix back
